summary: 0.6.31 is a narrow follow-up to 0.6.30 that keeps the grab-navigation handoff but removes the extra global navigation-disabled bit that was still starving full controller-motion grab-nav while the user gazed at the screen.
operatorSignals: 0.6.30 visibly released the nav lock, but grab-nav still only almost engaged and still felt partially captured while gazing at the screen.
The requested action is still the same narrow handoff seam, not a new navigation feature or a playback change.
actionsTaken: Kept the dedicated grab-navigation handoff state from 0.6.30.
Stopped setting VaM's global disableNavigation bit during the handoff.
Left ordinary internal navigation bindings disabled during the handoff and left the rest of the player untouched.
nonGoals: No A-B or transport policy changes.
